programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: First Stop : The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennesse Bound : The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Home Town : The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: L.A. At Last : After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan and the Starlets : Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets In Pictures : Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fashion Show : Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Hedda Hopper Show : Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan Is Shelved : Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bullfight Dance : Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hollywood Anniversary : Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Star Upstairs : Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In Palm Springs : Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Harpo Marx : Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dancing Star : Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Needs An Agent : Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tour : Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Visits Grauman's : The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And John Wayne : Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And The Dummy : Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Sells The Car : When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Great Train Robbery : Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Homecoming : On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lemon : When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 1) : When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 2) : When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Mistress : Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Genius : Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Magician : Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Fisherman : Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Heiress : Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lemon : When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 1) : When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 2) : When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Mistress : Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Dj : Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Captain : Matlock defends a patrolman framed for murder and is upset when he must investigate his longtime friend, the chief of police, as the prime murder suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Vendetta : Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Cover Me : Windblade's concern for Optimus' well-­‐being may spell doom for the entire Away Team when they run up against a sly hunter of a Decepticon named RAZORPAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Brianpower : Grimlock forgets how to fight when, in an effort to become smarter, he downloads a huge amount of data into his brain and overwrites his combat instincts.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Misdirection : More hints about Decepticon Island are revealed when Steeljaw invades the Scrapyard with a clever plan, and Bumblebee, Grimlock and Strongarm confront SCORPONOK, one of the Island's leaders.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bumblebee's Night Off : After being coaxed into going to a concert given by his favorite band, Bumblebee hopes for a quiet evening away from the Scrapyard, but finds action and danger when BISK attacks the arena.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Impounded : Grimlock's quest for an effective disguise goes into overdrive when QUILLFIRE returns and Bumblebee and Strongarm find themselves stuck in an impound lot.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Portals : Fixit's efforts to repair the GroundBridge go horribly awry, instead summoning two of the most legendary and fearsome Decepticons to the Scrapyard – and banishing Bumblebee to another dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Graduation Exercises : Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadevertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Decepticon Island, Part 1 : With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Decepticon Island, Part 2 : Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: History Lessons : Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Strongarm's Big Score : When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pretzel Logic : Not wanting the over-­‐aggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a "solo mission" to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mighty Big Trouble : The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mini–Con Madness : Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Worthy : Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: King Of The Hill –Part 1 : Overconfidence leaves the Bee Team unprepared when they face a Stunticon that can fire guided missiles...on the desert ground above a nuclear waste disposal site!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: King Of The Hill –Part 2 : Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heatseeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Defrosted : Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant "teacher" Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Blurred : While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sphere Of Influence : The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee Cool : BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Great Divide : When Stunticon Drag Strip steals a powerful Cybertronian artifact known as a Gravitic Adjuster, the Bee Team gives chase but arecaught in an explosion that once again fuses them into the Ultra Bee Team Combiner (UBTC).

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Get A Clue : A string of mysterious explosives thefts leave the Bee Team flummoxed, but Strongarm is convinced that there's a criminal mastermind at work.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Out Of The Shadows : DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER ,a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Disordered Personalities : After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix assuming that whomever winswillbe crowned the literal "ruler of the roads."

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Guilty As Charged : Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Golden Knight : When Fixit discovers an ancient Cybertronian signal originating on an island off the coast of England, he begs Bumblebee to tag along on the investigation.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Fastest Bot Alive! : When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous superspeed!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Railroad Rage : In his haste to polish Drift's Katana, Slipstream accidentally uses an acid that wrecks it. Before he can make repairs, the Bee Team races off to stop the Stunticons from stealing a high-tech train's engine.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Combine And Conquer : Bee insists his teambegin to follow his orders more rigorously, but this new micromanaging strategy shows cracks when Motormaster attacks a Meteor Deflector facility.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Moon Breaker : The Bee Team is about to embark on a mission to the moon to retrieve the last remaining cache item, when Optimus Prime arrives to recruit Drift for a special assignment.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Exiles : The Autobots are attacked by Steeljaw and his pack and driven from the Scrapyard. In the process, Sideswipe is nearly left behind, drudging up bad memories of his days alone on Cybertron.

programme.desc: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings (Part 1) : The Golden State Killer invaded homes, tortured and terrorized families, committed fifty brutal rapes and thirteen vicious murders, and was on the loose for forty-four years.

programme.desc: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness (Part 1) : The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific serial killers in Alaska’s history. For over a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he stalked them like prey.

programme.desc: The Amityville Horror: Murdered One by One (Part 1) : In November 1974, six members of the DeFeo family were found murdered inside their home. The mother, father, and four of their children were shot as they slept, discovered by the oldest son.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Amityville Horror: Evil in the House (Part 2) : In November 1974, six members of the DeFeo family were found murdered inside their home. The mother, father, and four of their children were shot as they slept, discovered by the oldest son.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Dating Game Killer: Smooth Talker (Part 1) : With a string of murders already behind him, Rodney Alcala is chosen to appear on the game show, “The Dating Game.” What happens next makes him one of the most horrific killers in US history.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Dating Game Killer: The Bite Mark (Part 2) : With a string of murders already behind him, Rodney Alcala is chosen to appear on the game show, “The Dating Game.” What happens next makes him one of the most horrific killers in US history.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Iceman: The Murder Business (Part 1) : A suburban family man, Richard Kuklinski, held a dark secret: he was the “Iceman” – a cold-blooded killer who was part-time mob hitman for hire, and full-time psychopath.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Vitalija Baliutavicienne : Donal MacIntyre interviews Detective Chief Inspector Martin Brunning to discover whether Vitalija Baliutaviciene's murder really was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Melissa Halstead/Paula Fields : Donal MacIntyre interviews former Detective Chief Inspector Howard Groves to discover how his dedication caught the double murderer known as the `Canal Killer'.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Parachute Murder Bid : Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Inspector Paul Franklin to discover how Wiltshire Police solved the attempted murder of Victoria Cilliers at the hands of her husband, Army Sergeant Emile Cilliers.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Gangland Hit : Detective Superintendent Andy Tattersall explains how Greater Manchester Police solved the case of Andrew Green's murder at the hands of a ruthless gangsters.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Murder Of The Secret Millionaire : Join Donal MacIntyre as he meets former Detective Chief Inspector Howard Groves to discover how the Metropolitan Police solved the murder of secret millionaire William Saunderson-Smith.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pickin' Perry-Dise : The guys pick an Appalachian village museum; Danielle is unimpressed with the pool candidates she's met to manage the new store; a father and son duo open the doors to their staggering collection.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: 8th Grade Humor : The guys freestyle on their home turf in Iowa; Frank has a few practical jokes up his sleeve; George opens the doors to his heavenly collection; the guys find themselves picking with a local history buff; Roger's has a 3,000-square-foot mega-pick.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Doctor Is In : The guys discover "Forevertron" in Wisconsin; a spare parts collection; a general store has been closed for 60 years.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Doctor Is Waiting : Mike and Frank are scolded when they arrive late for an appointment with Dr. Fred; once they get past his grumpy assistant, they find themselves in a strange world filled with all kinds of weird and wonderful things.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Roll Like a Rock Star : When the guys get a lead on what could be Aerosmith's original tour van, they head out on a cross-country trek in search of the holy grail of rock 'n' roll relics.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Urban Cowboys : The guys see a sign for Gilley's Club; Mickey Gilley's jam-packed warehouse; Paul's sprawling junkyard; peanut factory.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve : Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw! : Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil : It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W., The Picky Eater/Buster And The Daredevils : It's wrong to call D.W. a picky eater. The only things she won't eat are vegetables, fish, fruit, and meat. Then, Arthur and Buster meet two really cool kids and, naturally, are utterly dazzled. How far will Buster go to be cool?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room! : Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider : Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver/Play It Again, D.W. : A cat gets stuck in a tree and Buster Baxter saves the day! Risking life and limb! Next, the ridiculous Crazy Bus song is EVERYWHERE, but mostly it's in the Read's home, because D.W. has to play it 4000 times a day.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Tv-Free Week/Night Fright : The kids and parents of Ellwood City have all pledged not to watch TV for one whole week. Can they last? Then, big, brave Binky Barnes would be toast if people ever discovered he can't sleep without a night light.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur vs. The Piano/The Big Blow-Up : Arthur gets stage fright during a rehearsal. Will he be able to get through his recital without any mistakes? Then, two opinionated friends butt heads! Can Francine and The Brain put aside their differences for the good of the soccer team?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer : One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Goes To Washington/Arthur's Mystery Envelope : D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s Deer Friend/Buster Hits the Books : It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance : Arthur's in the midst of writing a great adventure story with Buster when he gets some very bad news--Buster is leaving town to go live with his Dad for a while. Then, does Francine have a crush on Arthur?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny : Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee : Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party : Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle : When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser : Francine and Catherine are very different, but it’s no fun if you're two sisters sharing the same room. Then, there's only one thing in life Arthur really wants—to win! But he just can't stop losing. Is it really so wrong to cheat a little?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur vs. The Very Mean Crossing Guard/D.W.'s Very Bad Mood : Arthur and The Brain encounter a new crossing guard on the way home from school. This guard isn't just mean, he's nuts! And, D.W. is making Arthur's life miserable! Francine decides she'd fix D.W.'s behavior before Arthur loses his mind.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers : D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister : What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter : Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself : When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous : Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids : Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip : What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Rules/Meet Binky : Writing your own name in graffiti all over the school wouldn't be very smart, right? Binky says he didn't do it, so detectives Fern and Buster are on the case. Then, Binky is the newest, hottest, hippest pop music craze in Elwood City.

programme.title: Catch the Bullet
programme.desc: Catch the Bullet : A U.S. marshal returns home from the trail to discover his 12-year-old son has been kidnapped by outlaws.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Hit and Run : A former getaway driver (Dax Shepard) finds feds and his former gang members on his tail when he breaks out of the Witness Protection Program to help his girlfriend (Kristen Bell) get to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: The Last Stand : A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: Lawless : A sadistic Chicago lawman comes to 1931 Virginia to shut down the Bondurant brothers' bootlegging business.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: Bangkok Dangerous : A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: The Winning Season : Increasingly estranged from his own daughter, a boozy busboy (Sam Rockwell) gets a shot at redemption when an old friend (Rob Corddry) hires him to coach a varsity girls basketball team.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Rabbit Hole : A man (Aaron Eckhart) and his wife (Nicole Kidman) begin to pull apart as they try various ways to cope with the accidental death of their young son.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Blown Apart : In September 1989, Partnair Flight 394 crashed into the sea killing all 55 people on board.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pacific Plunge : When Alaska Airlines Flight 261 suddenly nosedives into the Pacific, investigators uncover a critical maintenance issue with deadly implications.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: I'm the Problem : Moments before Pacific Southwest Flight 1771 crashes on a cattle ranch in California, gunshots are heard in the cabin.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Edge of Disaster : Atlantic Airways Flight 670 mysteriously careens off the runway and down an embankment on the tiny Norwegian island of Stord.

programme.title: Mayday: Accident Files
programme.desc: Creating New Problems : Confronting a crisis, unwitting pilots create far more serious problems.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Split Decision : Arrow Air Flight 1285 with 248 American soldiers on board crashes seconds after refueling in Newfoundland.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Accidents in the Air : From pilot error to meltdowns within air traffic control, investigators dig deep into three mid-air collisions that seem to defy logic.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Cockpit Killer : When an African airliner mysteriously crashes, Namibian investigators rule out a host of possible causes before reaching a chilling conclusion.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Blind Landing : Experts face a tricky investigation into the crash of TANS Peru Flight 204 after key evidence is looted from the crash site.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Stormy Cockpit : Pilots leaving Cameroon steer their plane clear of a storm, but the aircraft begins rolling to the right, and they are unable to regain control.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Fatal Transmission : A runway collision at a small airport turns tragic when passengers cannot escape the burning aircraft.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Testing the Limits : On 26 May 1991, the thrust reverser on the number one engine of Lauda Air Flight 004 deploys in flight without being commanded, causing the aircraft to spiral out of control, disintegrate, and crash about 100 miles northwest of Bangkok.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Perilous Payload : A look at disasters caused by improperly distributed weight or secured cargo.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pitch Black : In 1983, Air Illinois Flight 710 crashes into an open pasture area in poor weather while en route to Southern Illinois Airport, killing all 10 people on board; the cause of the crash was the pilots' mismanagement of an electrical problem.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Mission Disaster : After losing two engines near enemy territory, US Air Force pilots abort their refueling mission and attempt to land their damaged plane.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Cray Gardens : Catelynn and Tyler face a setback with the new house, Farrah and Debra continue to feud, Amber steps in to help Gary and Kristina, and bride-to-be Maci hosts a family dinner.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Number One Fan : A 25-year-old fan wins a charity auction for the right to spend the day with Sharon.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Lozt in Translation : The family travels to Japan, where Ozzy is to receive the Legend Award at the Video Music Awards.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Jenelle : North Carolina beach bunny who loves partying realizes her long-distance boyfriend isn't coming back, and that she's too immature to raise a baby herself.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Nikkole : Nikki is half prankster, half princess, whose posse of friends adore her but hate her disrespectful, trouble-making boyfriend Josh. Can she convince her friends and family that Josh is worthy of being a father to their son?

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Chelsea : Popular senior is caught up with her school life and fighting with her boyfriend Adam. She thinks things will go back to normal after she gives birth, but instead learns that she can choose her daughter above everything else.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Surprise Surprise! : Maci turns 25, Farrah deals with a challenging employee, Tyler celebrates Butch's important anniversary, and Matt's troubled son arrives as Amber tries to clear up nasty rumors.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: The Ties That Bind : Amber and Matt lay down strict rules for their houseguest, Farrah prepares her newest business, Maci enjoys her bridal shower, and Catelynn and Tyler's anniversary is marred by tough news.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Ginger's Last Binger : Maci and Taylor party in Las Vegas, Catelynn explores equine therapy, Amber and Matt meet with a writer to set the record straight, and Farrah's conflict with Debra hits a boiling point.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Cray Gardens : Catelynn and Tyler face a setback with the new house, Farrah and Debra continue to feud, Amber steps in to help Gary and Kristina, and bride-to-be Maci hosts a family dinner.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Fun at the Fair! : The squad return from Portugal but Sam has left the house which leaves Chloe thinking it's over. The family go radge at Newcastle's biggest funfair. Beau and Bethan make it official.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Geordies Do the Great Outdoors! : Chloe visits Sam and they make progress in their relationship. The squad go camping, and get attacked by midges. James decides to tell Sam about Chloe's kiss in Ibiza. (S20, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Somebody Always Has to Cry : It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: You Can't Just Be With Me? : Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Number One Fan : A 25-year-old fan wins a charity auction for the right to spend the day with Sharon.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Lozt in Translation : The family travels to Japan, where Ozzy is to receive the Legend Award at the Video Music Awards.

programme.title: The Osbournes

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Rico & Ja'Mari : Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Hundra & Emily : Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love is for real. Nev investigates to reveal a shocking Catfish. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Anthony & Marq : Anthony is a war veteran who wears his heart on his sleeve. Over a year ago, he bonded online with a caring man named Marq. Today, they're head over heels in love - but what is Marq hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jamey and Ari : Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Keyonnah & Bow Wow : Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Harold & Armani : Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Joe & Kari Ann : Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chitara & Priscilla : Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Trina & Scorpio : Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Dorion & Jeszica : Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Lucille & Kidd Cole : Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ashley & Mike : For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ayissha & Sydney : Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Andria & David : David is the only love Andria has ever known. Love letters and voice messages make Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, she needs to know what he is hiding that keeps him away. (S4, ep15)

programme.desc: Jamie Lee : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Jamie Lee teaches Rob all about "Girl Code," discusses the merits of "Drunk Sluts" and learns she's not the only one who's "Bad with Kids."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Stevie Ryan : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actress Stevie Ryan introduces Rob to "Jamie-Lynns," learns "Jelly Limbs" are an international problem, and discusses the ins and outs of "Getting Dookied."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling VII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel cross the pond to learn more about "British Dads" and "Wet Dumps" and share the new sport of "Free Biking."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mike Epps : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and comedian Mike Epps and Rob watch people "Getting Zombied," stuffing food in unlikely places to "Save it for Later" and ponder who is most deserving of "Bond or Burial" money.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jenna Marbles : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Internet sensation Jenna Marbles and Rob breakdown the web's best "Face Lookers," people whose injuries are "Selfie Inflicted" and the recent "Nerf-pocalypse."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Michael B Jordan : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actor Michael B. Jordan tells Rob about the pitfalls of Bad Bro-mates, learns some new Crying Styles and scores some Human Field Goals.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jackson Nicoll : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Bad Grandpa star Jackson Nicoll stares Rob down in "Made You Blink," sucker-punches Sterling with a "Jackson 5" and reveals why the best bathroom policy is: "Lock the Door!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Lil Duval : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Lil Duval stops by the studio; Rob warns of the dangers of "Evil Tires" and how having a "Florida Vibe" isn't always a good thing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling VIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel explore the fun side of "Chatter Gas," experience some "No Pros" going down and expose true feelings in "Surprise, I Hate You."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dudesons : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob watches Finland's craziest stuntmen, The Dudesons, become "Nudesons," blast butts with "Fire in the Hole" and take aim at some "Human Targets."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Nyjah Huston : On an all-new Ridiculousness, skating sensation Nyjah Huston and Rob watch some "Less Gifted" athletes, see poorly behaved guys "Getting Nyjah'd" and learn how to forget everything with some heavy-hitting "Mind Erasers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Derek Hough : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, dancer and choreographer Derek Hough and Rob discuss the "Future of Dance," see what happens to people with "Garbage Feet" and learn how to "Knock Yourself Out."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling X : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel see some beauty destroyed in "Not the Face!" redheads get slammed in "Code Red" and some distracted people meet their fate in "Obliviousness."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Tyga : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Tyga laughs with Rob as guys get nutted in "Rack City," bad drivers think they "Found a Spot" and innocent victims get painfully close to sneakers in "Check Out My Kicks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Guy Fieri : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, foodie famous Guy Fieri and Rob take a tour through the Ridiculous side of "Flavortown," learn how to "Tame Your Flame," and say farewell to "Junky Cars."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Harley Morenstein : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Harley "Epic Mealtime" Morenstein and Rob expose some "Epic Meal Crimes," discover the shock of "Human Bacon," and unravel the big meaning of "Balthazars."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling IX : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob hangs with Sterling and Chanel to breakdown some "Extreme Hugging," see why people get "Un-followed" and join in the fun of a little "Slap Fight."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Lacey Chabert : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actress Lacey Chabert and Rob break down old folk's "Last Minute Adventures," and lovers' "Tender Moments," while Lacey explains why it's not always easy "Acting Sexy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chrissy Teigen : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, supermodel Chrissy Teigen shows off her "Swimsuit Issues," while Rob explores the funny side of "Party Bruises" and the power of "Healing Hugs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Eddie Huang : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, TV host and restaurateur Eddie Huang picks through some "Hot Trash," explains to Rob what it means to be "Fresh Off The Boat," and enjoys drivers even worse than Eddie

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Torpedo : Jeremy travels to Central America to locate a man-sized beast that reportedly leaps into boats and inflicts devastating injuries upon fishermen.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Vampires of the Deep : Extreme angler Jeremy embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster said to rise from the depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Amazon Titanic : Supreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to South America to hunt for a seriously gargantuan fish found in the dark depths of the Amazon River.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Invisible Killers : Jeremy has tracked down freshwater killers for 30 years, but now he's discovered that he was sharing those waters with darker, deadlier creatures - parasites.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Weapons : Jeremy Wade recalls his many battles against dangerous water creatures, and the techniques and weapons he used to survive these encounters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Lethal Legends : Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan; and is a murderous river spirit wreaking havoc on the Zambezi? Jeremy Wade investigates.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Encounters : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Catfish : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with the world's deadliest catfish. What makes this type of fish so supremely dominant?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Untold Stories : Jeremy Wades shares untold tales and previously unseen footage from his many adventures.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Top Ten Beasts : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes, tackling an 11-foot black caiman and sitting alongside a 17-foot anaconda.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The Empire Ships Back : Dusty connects with his inner nerd after booking Star Wars movie memorabilia along with a massive Kung Fu Panda statue.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Gumby's 60th Veggie Surprise : With Todd and Tamera at the helm, Gumby's trip to a 60 year celebration ends up looking more like a funeral.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Holy Horrible Voice, Batman! : Todd and Tamera prove they are NOT superheroes when they struggle to haul Batman's cape worn by Val Kilmer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Munsters... the Final Frontier : Marc lands a Frankenstein sized Munster load from the classic TV show.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Tower of Power : Natasha risks profit and time when signals get crossed on the dimensions of a massive radio tower, while Dwight and Tyesha fear becoming the villains after a load of super hero statues get roughed up under their watch.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The Creature and the Wine : A massive animatronic creature with a one-day deadline is nightmare fuel for Molly and Russell, while Tamara has dreams of a sweet payday getting an oversized wine barrel across the country.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Playing with Fire : Natasha's big rig is in question when she takes on transporting a vintage fire truck to its original home, while Molly and Russell's load filled with Hollywood memorabilia is crate filled with issues.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Skills USA : Mike attends the SkillsUSA National Competition in Kansas City, Missouri, and tries his hand at welding, cake decorating, and broadcasting. Spoiler Alert: He’s not good!

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: STEAM Circus : Mike visits the Two-Bit Circus in Los Angeles, California, where disruptive innovators have added an A to STEM to make it STEAM—Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: CalTrans : Mike meets the man who is pulling millions of pounds of trash from America’s waterways.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Aircraft Carrier Part 1 : In this two-episode segment, Mike and his crew take you deep inside the workings of the largest ship in the US Navy, the USS John Stennis.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Aircraft Carrier Part 2 (intro) : From the mess hall to the flight deck, Mike does every job on the ship, and along the way learns the history of these floating cities.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Lowrider : Mike learns the history of lowrider culture from the Fuentes brothers of Homies Hydraulics and gets tricked into competing in a crazy car-jumping contest.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Bobblehead / Cigar Box Guitar : Mike learns the ups and downs of bobblehead making from the folks at Royal Bobble in Atlanta.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Ornithologist : Mike does some serious bird watching at the North Carolina Museum of Natural Sciences and assists Lead Ornithologist John Gerwin in teaching the next generation of bird lovers.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Sheepherding : Mike embraces his inner K9 and learns firsthand how dogs get trained by master trainer and owner of Action K9 Sports, Terry Parrish.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Dragon Forge : Mike visits the Dragon Forge shop where father and son blacksmiths Craig and Rory May teach him how to bend steel using old-time, anvil-banging, heavy metal forging.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Sturgeon Spearing : Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: U.P. Snowmobile Patrol : Michigan Conservation Officers in the U.P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 1 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 2 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: First Day of Deer Season : Michigan hunters harvested the second most whitetails in the country. Keeping track of everyone in the field requires near 24/7 surveillance.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Illegal Blinds : Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Bears in the U.P. : It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Westside Fishing : The westside of Michigan has some of the state's best fishing spots. From inland rivers to the Great Lakes, C.O.s know their fall will be spent watching anglers.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol : Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Pure Michigan : The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Detroit River Walleye : Conservation Officers patrol fishermen and women on the Detroit River, on the border between Michigan and Canada during the spring spawning run for walleye.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Autumn East to West : An officer on Michigan's east side meets a driver on the road without a license and an officer on the state's west side patrols during a waterfowl hunt on a state game area.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Man-Made Fires : Conservation Officers on patrols during fall fishing season as well as spring turkey season encounter suspects that have set fires in conditions where they shouldn't have.

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Bridges : From amazing ancient Roman aqueducts and arch bridges, romantic Renaissance spans, 19th-century railroad crossovers, to monumental marvels of our time, bridges played a key role in the human quest to connect and unify.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Father Crime : When Shifu's con-man father comes back into town, Po finds himself in the middle.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Kung Fu Kid : Po is excited when he discovers a kung fu prodigy, but starts to worry when people seem to prefer the new kid to their beloved Dragon Warrior.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Ladies of the Shade : Po befriends a band of dancers, unaware they're actually a band of traveling thieves.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: In With the Old : When the Furious 5 are all out of town and the Jade Palace is attacked, Po only has his dad and two old people to help him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Monkey in the Middle : A rash of thefts in the Valley of Peace has the villagers in uproar and things only get worse when the culprit appears to be... Monkey?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Has-been Hero : Po's Kung Fu hero, Kwan the Unkillable, comes to the Valley of Peace and appears to be a feeble old man. Po agrees to stage a fight to help him get back on top. But Kwan may not be as weak as he looks.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Kung Fu Day Care : Tigress is forced to babysit a small child who has been separated from his parents.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Maltese Mantis : Po and Mantis visit the equivalent of an ancient Chinese Comic-Con, where Po's fanboy enthusiasm gets out of hand.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Most Dangerous Po : Po's visit to a famous war hero goes awry when he finds out the retired general is off his rocker.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Crane On A Wire : Po tries to help Crane get his "mojo" back after Crane is humiliated at a charity event.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Shifu's Back : When Shifu throws out his back, Po has to sit in as master of the Jade Palace.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Midnight Stranger : When kung fu is outlawed, Po turns to donning a mask to fight crime.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Po Who Cried Ghost : Po's worst childhood fears come true when he comes face to face with hopping ghosts! (Special Halloween Episode)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Break Up : When two Croc Bandits have a spat, it's up to Po and Mr. Ping to set things right.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Kung Shoes : In an attempt to get out of training, Po buys some enchanted shoes that will heighten his kung fu abilities. Unfortunately for Po, the magical shoes are evil and will soon put him and all those around him in great danger.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Qilin Time : Po is embarrassed when his dad takes him on a wild goose chase, but it turns out his dad is not so crazy afterall.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: A Tigress Tale : When Master Mugan from the Garnet Palace decides she needs a new Kung Fu Master, Tigress volunteers. Will the Furious Five be minus one or will Po convince Tigress to return to the Jade Palace?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Master and the Panda : When Po's friend Peng returns to the Valley of Peace, everyone is excited...except for Po. What no one else knows is that Peng is actually evil Tai Lung's nephew. Now Po has to admit to powerful Peng that he is the one who skadooshed his uncle.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Present Tense : As the annual Winter Festival approaches, Po doesn't have enough money to buy his dad the present he deserves, so he takes a job as a bounty hunter to capture a dangerous escaped convict for the reward. But Po's plan doesn't go as smooth as he hoped.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Royal Pain : Po takes on the challenge of training a lovable but klutzy member of the Emperor's family. However, will Po's training be enough to protect them both from the evil designs of a traitor in their midst?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Bosom Enemies : After dealing Taotie yet another humiliating defeat, Po is horrified to learn that the villainous warthog has had a full on nervous breakdown. Po is determined to heal his spirit and Taotie is eager to change his evil ways...or is he?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Secret Admirer : When Po's fake love letter prank on Monkey backfires, the duo's relationship is put to the test in a story of jealousy, betrayal and, yes, even kidnapping.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Invitation Only : Po is sad when he learns that everyone has been invited to a dinner party except for him, due to his poor table manners. Will Shifu be able to teach Po proper etiquette AND foil the attack of evil Temutai and his army?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Shifu's Ex : When Shifu's ex-girlfriend, Mei Ling, visits the Jade Palace, Po decides to try and get them back together, despite the fact Mei Ling is now Shifu's most hated enemy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Shoot the Messenger : Po and Tigress must track down and stop a messenger from delivering a scroll that could thrust China into all-out war!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Enter the Dragon Part 1 : Po and the Furious Five meet their greatest challenge yet: a supernatural creature who is invincible to the powers of kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Enter the Dragon Part 2 : Po and the Furious Five meet their greatest challenge yet: a supernatural creature who is invincible to the powers of kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Mama Told Me not to Kung Fu : Crane's mom visits the Valley of Peace. Crane reveals to Po that his mom hates Kung Fu so he promised her that he would never have anything to do with it. Crane asks Po and the others to help him keep his secret from his mom.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Huge : Self-conscious about his size, Mantis ingests a growth potion that makes him huge. Mantis is initially thrilled with the results, but soon his large size puts the entire village and his friends in grave danger.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Eye of the Tiger : Team dynamics are tested in a collaborative tag-team Elimination Tattoo focusing on anatomy and consistency, and the coaches make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pane in the Glass : Teamwork is essential in a glass painting Flash Challenge, and the artists create stone-themed Elimination Tattoos, causing one artist to crack under the pressure.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Raider : The devil is in the details when the artists must tattoo intricate, technicolor hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Some Assembly Required : The artists must work together in a series of tag-team tattoo challenges, and a massive twist forces one team's artists to turn on one another.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Quit Buggin' Me : The coaches step up to create micro insect tattoos, the artists tackle painful sternum Elimination Tattoos, and one artist's technical mistake seals their fate.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Total Meltdown : The artists must use melted wax to showcase their composition skills, and a negative space elimination tattoo leaves some artists scratching their heads.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Monkey See, Monkey Do : The artists must match their coaches' designs in the Elimination Tattoo, and an intense freehand face-off sends one more artist home.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: No Stain, No Gain : One team shines during a wood staining flash challenge, monochromatic portraits send the artists into a panic, and one more artist is sent packing.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Final Exam : The artists push themselves to the limit in a grueling 12-hour Elimination Tattoo challenge, and the masters fight to gain an advantage in the finale.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Return of the Masters Finale : The coaches face off live onstage, eliminated artists return to help the judges deliberate over the artists' 24-hour master canvases, and a new Ink Master is crowned.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Opening Shots : Legendary rivals Cleen Rock One and Christian Buckingham make their epic returns, and 22 new artists compete for a spot on their teams.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Not on My Watch : Team Cleen and Team Christian face off in a fundamentals Flash Challenge, and the artists tackle a difficult Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Right on Target : Team Cleen and Team Christian face off in a Flash Challenge featuring dominoes, and the Elimination Tattoo forces the artists to think outside the box.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: No Wrist, No Reward : The coaches face off in their first Grudge Match to keep their team safe from elimination, and the artists test their knack for consistency with wristband tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: That's Gonna Leave A Mark : A Flash Challenge using electrical tape tests the teams' creativity, and the artists face challenging placements on their canvases during the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fight Your Own Battles : Christian and Cleen's artists work with their teammates in a tag-team tattoo on a single canvas, and one coach puts two of his artists on the chopping block.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Personal Assistant, Professional Failure : In the heart of Texas, Jon must help an owner figure out how to be a better boss and help her personal assistant step up to lead the bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Doing it for Dad : After losing their father and stepmom, three sisters find themselves unexpectedly owning a bar that they never learned how to run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bar Rescue Shutting Down the Confetti Party : Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bar Rescue Penalty on the Bar : In Dunwoody, Georgia, Jon Taffer tries to help a former hospitality professional regain his passion for the industry and save his flailing bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Quick-Sandtown Rescue : In the heart of Atlanta, Jon helps an owner seize her second chance in life by saving her struggling bar and managing her staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Working to Death : Jon heads to Tampa, Florida to help save an owner who has suffered personal loss and health scares while trying to single-handedly keep his struggling bar afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Magically Atrocious : In Ybor City, Florida, Jon helps rescue a bar owner who made some questionable choices on the theme, decor, and menu in her bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Rescue on the River : A riverside bar in Florida is struggling to stay afloat due to a manager with no experience, a staff co-mingling, and a wildly out of line menu for their community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Till Failure Do You Part : In Gibsonton, Florida, Jon must help rescue not only a failing bar but a broken marriage after the Covid pandemic destroyed both their business and their relationship.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Game Over : Jon heads to Sanford, Florida to revitalize a retro-arcade bar that is falling apart and an owner who has an excuse for everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Beach Bummer : A bar owner's relationship with her incompetent manager causes complications as Jon tries to save their failing Irish pub on a Redondo Beach pier.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Fallen Angels : It's up to Jon to save a failing biker bar that's become more strip club than cocktail lounge thanks to its rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Blue Frog Sings the Blues : The constant feuding between the mother and son owners of The Blue Frog 22 in Chicago threatens the business's existence, forcing Jon to intervene.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Shabby Abbey : To save The Abbey Pub, a historic music venue in Chicago, Jon must make peace between the sibling managers who don't see eye-to-eye.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Downey's and Out : In order to save a failing Irish pub in Philadelphia, Jon must reinvigorate its owner, who was once a star chef.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Swanky Troubles : Jon must deal with a sprawling menu, a bad layout, and a womanizing co-owner if he hopes to save Swanky Bubbles, a dysfunctional champagne bar in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chumps : Jon must get a lenient bar owner to reign in his raucous over-pouring bartenders if he is going to save a dated Burbank, CA, sports bar.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: World War Zimmerman : Cartman sees Token as a threat to all humanity.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Cissy : Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Entity : Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Toilet Paper : Cartman convinces the boys to "toilet paper" their teacher's house, but Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Casa Bonita : Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny, and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go "missing."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina : As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Free Willzyx : The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Smug Alert! : Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland : When the entire contents of the world’s imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he’s seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode II : Stan and Kyle are being held in the bowels of the Pentagon until they tell the government how they got into Imaginationland. Meanwhile, Cartman simply won’t rest until he finds Kyle and gets him to make good on their bet to suck his balls.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode III : Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Guitar Queer-O : Stan and Kyle are hooked on Guitar Hero. Unfortunately, Stan’s superior skills on the video game damage his friendship with Kyle.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The List : The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy’s looks from cutest to ugliest. When the boys steal the list, they are completely unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Margaritaville : Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Whale Whores : Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world’s whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Sexual Healing : The latest in scientific testing reveals that some of the boys at South Park Elementary have a sex addiction problem.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: It's A Jersey Thing : New Jersey is taking over the nation one state at a time. Randy and the boys take a stand as the Jerseyites approach South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: HUMANCENTiPAD : Kyle is intimately involved in the development of a revolutionary new product called HumancentiPad.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crack Baby Athletic Association : Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman’s latest business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A History Channel Thanksgiving : The boys are getting close to discovering the truth about the first Thanksgiving.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Taming Strange : When Ike hits puberty, he and Kyle start to grow apart. To save their relationship, Kyle takes Ike to see a live performance of Yo Gabba Gabba.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: #REHASH : Kyle just wants to play video games with his little brother. But, when Ike doesn’t want to play with him anymore, Kyle is afraid that the next generation is passing him by.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: #HappyHolograms : Cartmaan Bra is trending as the country prepares to watch the biggest Holiday Spectacular ever.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: You're Not Yelping : Cartman considers himself the top on-line restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig : Kyle's mom won't let him keep his new pet, an elephant because it's so huge. So the boys turn turn to the Dr. Mephesto to genetically engineer a smaller elephant.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey, the Christmas Poo : While South Park Elementary is attempting to stage a non-denominational holiday play that won't offend (or entertain) anyone, Kyle checks himself into the South Park mental asylum.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand : The boys' discovery of a prehistoric relic spawns a monster that threatens to destroy South Park and the world.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee : Mr. Mackey, the school counselor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chinpokomon : Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon!

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000 : When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for his lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons : Kyle needs a kidney transplant and Cartman is discovered to be the perfect donor. Cartman gladly offers his kidney to Kyle -- for the price of $10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure : To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival cities.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
