programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Murder, Country Style : The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Delusions Of Murder : A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Physician, Murder Thyself : A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Deadly Flirtation : In order to solve particularly difficult murder cases, the investigators reconstruct the last 24 hours of the victims; usually, there are most signs of the crime and evidence of the perpetrator.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Out Of Control : Detectives investigate the death of 19-year-old Missy Grubaugh, found dead in an apartment fire in 1994; the list of suspects include a former roommate, a vicious coworker, and her boyfriend.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: An Eye for An Eye : When an ambitious and successful woman is shot dead in the garage of her suburban Texas home, investigators have many suspects to choose from, including her son, her ex-husband, and two admirers.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Mad Love : A Portland factory worker finds his missing SUV two months after it went missing, with the body of his estranged wife in the back seat.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Kill Shot : A sniper attack leaves a teacher from Pennsylvania dead, in a seemingly perfect murder; investigators are forced to look back at the killer's chronology to help them find clues.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Blind Terror : The story of a successful family caught up in lies and deception, which led to murder; a well-known Miami practice makes more enemies than the owners care to admit.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: No Sleep for the Wicked : Detectives uncover details of a Louisiana man's extracurricular love life after he's shot dead, also finding a death policy that pays out even in the event of murder.

programme.title: Sky Cops
programme.desc: Calling the Shots : South Yorkshire's Sky Cops are called to help foil a gun trafficker's deal and an armed siege involving a suicidal man.

programme.title: Sky Cops
programme.desc: Night Shift : The Sky Cops are on night shift and are called to help arrest scrap metal thieves whose lives are at risk in an old disused colliery.

programme.title: Sky Cops
programme.desc: Rookies : Jamie Theakston narrates a series about Britain's helicopter police; cameras follow London's sky cops as they go after criminals, keep the peace during city events and track down troublemakers.

programme.title: Sky Cops
programme.desc: Under Pressure : As the unit chases crooks down the canal pathways in east London, the pressure is on for five young police officers wannabe sky cops; only two can make it, but none might be chosen; the veterans in the unit decide to shake things up a bit.

programme.title: Sky Cops
programme.desc: Turning the Tide : Burglars are stealing the keys to luxury cars worth hundreds of thousands of pounds in South Yorkshire.

programme.title: Dogs With Jobs
programme.desc: Jassel; Ingrid; Hogan : A New Zealand heading dog guides her owner, who is hard of hearing and losing eyesight; a Cardigan corgi competes in an all-breed herding competition; a Lab competes at an indoor dock jumping competition.

programme.title: Dogs With Jobs
programme.desc: Keno; Mentor; Prince : A Labrador retriever works at the Fernie Alpine Resort in British Columbia as an avalanche rescue dog; a poodle helps an amputee; a beagle sniffs out forbidden fruit at the Auckland International Airport.

programme.title: Dogs With Jobs
programme.desc: Annie, Casey & Sailor : Workaholic border collie; basset hound competes for the Master Agility Excellent title; pug visits hospitals.

programme.title: Dogs With Jobs
programme.desc: Zelda; Azili; Amy : Photogenic bulldog models for greeting cards; dog guards the chickens; seeing-eye dog for dogs.

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Once Bitten : Following the work of Britain's police dogs in real operations.

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Hide and Seek : Two new recruits, Eddie and Keela, are brought in from the South Yorkshire police force after assisting in such high-profile cases as the search for Madeleine McCann and investigations into alleged child abuse in Jersey.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: In Which We Meet Mr. Jones : When a strange parasite attaches itself to the internal organs of a dying agent, Agent Dunham rushes to Germany to meet with a prisoner who reveals details of a much larger threat.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Equation : When a music prodigy is kidnapped, it's discovered that a sequence of flashing lights appeared at the abduction — which Walter links back to his bunkmate at St. Claire's Hospital.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Dreamscape : While investigating a mystifying incident at Massive Dynamic, Olivia seeks to rid her consciousness of Agent Scott and Peter's past catches up with him.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Safe : While investigating a series of extraordinary bank robberies that defy the laws of physics, Walter realizes that the high-tech thieves are after something of his.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Bound : After shifty FBI Agent Loeb orchestrated Mr. Jones's otherworldly escape from a German prison and Olivia's alarming abduction, indications of a larger threat begin to emerge.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The No Brainer : A computer scientist-turned-serial killer has discovered an unconventional method of killing people — by liquefying their brains.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Transformation : When another mysterious virus emerges aboard an international flight, leaving freakish remains, Peter & Olivia are forced to go undercover to investigate the latest bizarre threat.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Ability : German agents question Olivia when Mr. Jones returns and a lethal toxin is released that causes victims to die without faces — as their orifices suddenly and mysteriously close up.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Thoughts : Kiera investigates a new street drug she recognizes from her future.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Skin : Kiera races to track down who she thinks is another time traveler.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Opinion : Kiera has an emotional breakdown, which activates a psychiatric program embedded in her CMR.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Truths : Kiera must use her knowledge of the future to stop a serial killer.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Degree : Kiera and Carlos must stop a Liber8 plot. Alec has to make an important decision.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Listen : Kiera investigates the disappearance of deceased time travelers' bodies. Garza takes Alec hostage.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Seconds… : Alec's mother is shot. Kiera must decide how far she will go to stop Julian's murderous future.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Compilation Show : A compilation of highlights featuring Chris Pratt, Anthony Joshua, Dame Judi Dench, Keira Knightley, Sir Ian McKellen, Olivia Colman, Emily Blunt, Sir Michael Caine, Michael B Jordan, Chris Pine, Rami Malek, Lady Gaga and Ryan Gosling.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Compilation Episode : A retrospective on the season, featuring eminent guests such as Harrison Ford, Emma Thompson, Robert De Niro, Mary Berry, Sir Elton John, Lady Gaga, Benedict Cumberbatch and others.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Compilation : Highlights from the fifteenth series of the talk show, with guests including Tom Cruise, Julie Walters, Matt Damon, Dame Julie Andrews, Bill Murray, Julianne Moore, Emma Stone, Sylvester Stallone, Robert De Niro, Olivia Colman and Carey Mulligan.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Compilation Show : A compilation of highlights from the series, featuring Will Smith, Madonna, Chris Hemsworth, Tom Hanks, Taylor Swift, Anne Hathaway, Charlize Theron, Seth Rogen, Taron Egerton and Sir Ian McKellen.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham presents a selection of highlights.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined on the sofa by Tina Fey, Amy Poehler, Quentin Tarantino, Kurt Russell and Sia.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa tonight: Michael Fassbender and Oscar winner Kate Winslet, 50 Cent and Julie Walters.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined by oscar-winning Hollywood superstar Russell Crowe, screen siren Cameron Diaz, comic actor and director Richard Ayoade, and Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined by Ewan McGregor, Lewis Hamilton, Jack Whitehall and Rita Ora who performs her new single `Poison'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Among the guests on Graham's sofa are `Pirates' and `Lord of the Rings' star Orlando Bloom, on the West End stage for `Killer Joe', and comedy genius Stephen Merchant, voicing new animation `Sherlock Gnomes'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Matthew McConaughey in new crime adventure `Gold', actress Christina Ricci starring as Zelda Fitzgerald in `Z: The Beginning of Everything', top comedian Josh Widdicombe and singing superstar Ed Sheeran.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Guests include star of `The Girl in the Spider's Web' Claire Foy, Hollywood action hero Kurt Russell, actor and comedian Lee Evans, and comedian and writer David Walliams. Also featuring music from Mumford & Sons.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Joining Graham on the sofa are British stars Eddie Redmayne and Jude Law, appearing together in `Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald'. Also, comic actor Melissa McCarthy, Oscar winner Emma Stone, and music from Rick Astley.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, together in `La La Land', as well as actor and director Ben Affleck and British star Sienna Miller together in the crime film `Live By Night'. Plus, music from Gregory Porter.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : On Graham's sofa are Warren Beatty talking about `Rules Don't Apply', Miranda Hart starring in `Annie', Keeley Hawes in TV series `The Durrells', and Peter Capaldi discusses his decision to leave `Doctor Who'. Plus, music from Jennifer Hudson.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Among the guests on Graham's sofa tonight: double Oscar-nominated actress Brenda Blethyn; comic actor Stephen Mangan, starring in new movie `Postman Pat'; iconic fashion designer Jean Paul Gaultier; and the musical legend that is Barry Manilow.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daisy and Sophie : A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Lucy and Lizzie : Cesar helps Lucy, an odd dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Raging Bandit : Cesar has his hands full with a Labrador that is obsessed with water and a Chihuahua with a penchant for biting legs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet : Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Desperate Housedogs : A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Caged Heat : Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Stuck in the Mirror : When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: The Gladiator : A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's Big Deal : An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Gotti's Honor : A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Grizzly Dogs : Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Wolf-Dogs: Out of the Wild : Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Honeymoon Hell : Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Splatty Tomato : The children of South Park claim to have seen Mr. Garrison lurking around town. The townspeople are angry that the president is scaring their children.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Death : Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin : Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip in Not Without My Anus : Terrance and Phillip must save Terrance's Little Daughter, Sally, and all of Canada from an evil dictator.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chickenpox : The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cow Days : South Park's 14th Annual "Cow Days" rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Spookyfish : When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Merry Christmas Charlie Manson! : Dinner with Cartman's family takes a bizarre twist when Uncle Howard shows up after breaking out of prison with the help of his cellmate, Charlie Manson.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Timmy 2000 : When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow : When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer : All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Simpsons Already Did It : Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by "The Simpsons."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Canada : The Brovlofski family is dealt a devastating blow when Ike's Canadian birth parents show up unexpectedly. When the townspeople decide to forego Christmas gifts and take up a collection to get Ike home to South Park, the boys are distraught.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crème Fraiche : Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.desc: The Loss : As an unknown force drags the Enterprise, Deanna Troi struggles with the loss of her powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Whom Gods Destroy : Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Let That Be Your Last Battlefield : The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Mark Of Gideon : Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Tholian Web : Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Plato's Stepchildren : After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Wink Of An Eye : Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Empath : On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Elaan Of Troyius : The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: That Which Survives : Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Lights Of Zetar : The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Requiem For Methuselah : While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.desc: Nash Bridges : Don Johnson is Nash Bridges, a San Francisco police investigator who deserves his reputation as the city’s top cop. Nash relies on his instincts, a keen sense of humor and a lot of charm to work his magic on the streets of San Francisco.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Teen Mama Drama : Dr. Phil discusses teen pregnancy: In the U.S., one in six become teen moms with fathers often not held to the same accountability in child-rearing. Taten, 18, has an infant daughter with one teen girl, with another teen pregnant. Paternity test results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Texas Shooting: Enough Is Enough : After another mass shooting in America, the elementary school in Uvalde, Texas where 2 teachers and 19 children were killed, Dr. Phil dedicates the show to speaking out about how these senseless acts of murder need to end and the importantance of change.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What Happened To Stacey? What The Evidence Shows Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil's interview with death row inmate Rodney Reed continues. Reed's attorney, Bryce Benjet tells what he thinks happened to Stacey. Retired NYPD detective Kevin Gannon & criminologist Dr. Lee Gilbertson say they know who killed Stacey & how.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Whatever Happened To...(Most Talked About Guests) : Do you ever wonder how your favorite Dr. Phil guest is faring since being on the show? Dr. Phil follows up with some of his most talked about guests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Ex Is Evil: I Want To See My Kids : Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents Accused Of Murder: Will Julia and Codey Agree To Take The Polygraph Test? Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues discussions with Tommy, ex-wife, Julia & new husband, Codey, over the deaths of 19-month-old Darby & 4-year-old Kiera. Dr. Phil enlists forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht to examine the autopsy reports. Polygraph tests are offered.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Test Results Revealed: Is 15-Year-Old Marie Really Pregnant Pt. 2 : Meet 15-year-old Marie who says she is now pregnant after running away three times. Dr. Phil confronts Marie about a prenatal regimen, her plan and ensuing drama over a pregnancy test request. Dr. Phil and the family discuss pregnancy test results. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Teens Obsessed With Love : Teens are obsessed with love more than ever. Parents are concerned over measures their daughters take to keep a boyfriend. A poll asked teens about extreme behavior, some saying they had sex when the didn't want to. Parents, don't miss these safety steps.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Innocence Robbed: A Horrific Story Of Abuse : It's a parent's worst nightmare to learn their child was sexually abused, especially in their own home. Patty says her world ended the day she learned her husband was sexually abusing her 3 daughters. What warning signs did she miss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda's Secret: Forbidden Love Pt. 1 : Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parental Abductions Pt. 1 : Families are devastated when children go missing, but oftentimes it is a parental abduction. Fifteen years ago, John Clark came home from work to find his wife and three children gone, leaving only a cryptic note saying they went on vacation. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ultimate Home Invasion : Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Sister Intervention: The Boyfriend's Sordid Past Revealed Pt. 2 : Emotions run high when Kim’s sisters meet boyfriend Stacy for the first time and Dr. Phil reveals a shocking secret from Stacy’s past. What explanation does Stacy offer? How much did Kim know? Plus, Dr. Phil's advice for the family moving forward. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Neighbor Feud Erupts With Constant Calls To The Police, False Allegations, Trumped Up Charges, And Threats Of Violence : Jana & Allen say neighbors Maritha & Melanie moved into the neighborhood: police reports, DFS, threats & their 4 dogs bark all hours of the night! Maritha & Melanie point to Jana & Allen, with Melanie being charged with misconduct for mooning a neighbor!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Forced To Be A Father : Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Headline Horror Stories : With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Ex-Wife Claims I Molested Our Daughter Who Ran Off With Her Boyfriend Pt. 2 : Gina asked Dr. Phil for help with her daughter Alexis, saying she was kidnapped by her survivalist boyfriend David. As the story unfolds, another layer surfaces, allegations of molestation by a family member. Find out who, and will a polygraph tell all?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : A shock dumping is announced, but which four islanders will be leaving for good? A pole dancing challenge causes drama in the villa. Will Gabby forgive Marcel?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : New boys Theo and Jamie take some of the girls out on blind dates, leaving the boys back in the villa worried. Marcel and Gabby continue to grow closer.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Olivia and Chris look to be on the rocks as they question whether they are truly compatible. Theo makes a splash in the villa. Kem has a question for Amber.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Jonny is forced to question how Tyla feels for him. Things are on the up for Jamie and Camilla. A new bombshell enters the villa. A shock recoupling is announced.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : As Tyla and Jonny look to be falling out, Theo and Jonny make up - but for how long? Are Chris and Olivia as solid as it seems? Camilla and Jamie get closer.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The islanders enjoy a day of celebrations for Camilla's birthday. Are Chris and Olivia on a break or not? Tensions continue to rise between Jonny, Theo and Tyla.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Tyla and Jonny hit the rocks, while things heat up between Camilla and Jamie. A new rap trio is formed. Emotions run high as a shock dumping is announced.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Theo makes amends after causing a scene at Jonny's departure. Chris and Olivia hit the rocks again. Alex and Montana get closer, but will they make it official?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Two familiar faces return to the villa, leaving single girls Olivia, Georgia and Tyla wondering who fancies whom. Later, the boys get the girls' hearts racing in a striptease challenge.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Mike and Sam make their moves on Tyla and Georgia. Later, a recoupling is announced, meaning one lad will be going home before the night is over.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : With things looking good for Sam and Georgia, some of the islanders question Mike and Tyla's relationship. Camilla and Jamie talk about their future.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : A Twitter challenge causes drama in the villa as truths are revealed. Jamie and Camilla get even closer. The results of the latest public vote are announced.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: To Russia With Love : With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Gypsy Eyes : Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Act of Terror : When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Black Jet : Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Silent Service : Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: King of the Greenie Board : Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Rules of Engagement : The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: True Callings : When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Psychic Warrior : When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Angels & Daemons : A tech entrepreneur and venture capitalist who secretly developed a computer program that stealthily collects data is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Come Back : Kensi and Deeks announce that they are moving in together right before they are assigned to protection detail for Kensi's ex-fiance, who has a list of important contacts that people are willing to kill for.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Matryoshka Part 1 : The team goes under cover with Arkady's daughter at a Los Angeles gala to gain access to the Russian Consul General's computer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Matryoshka Part 2 : Part 2 of 2. In Russia, Callen, Sam and Anna plot to break Anna's father and his CIA agent companion out of prison. Meanwhile, Callen finally learns what the G in his name stands for.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Revenge Deferred : A discovery sends Callen and Sam to Africa to investigate; Sam's family is transported to a safe house.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Exchange Rate : A convicted Cuban spy escapes U.S. custody just before he is set to return to his country in a prisoner exchange; and the team is shocked when they learn that Anna helped him break free.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Seventh Child : Callen tries to connect with a boy in imminent danger who has been brainwashed by a terrorist cell. Meanwhile, Deeks and Kensi discuss having children.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Seoul Man : The team members search for a North Korean spy when they are assigned to protective details for the commander of the Pacific Command.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Head of the Snake : After Operational Psychologist Nate Getz (Peter Cambor) fails to check in with Hetty while working undercover on a mission linking organized crime to terrorism, the team learns he is working with an infamous crime leader

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Granger, O. : Granger escorts Jennifer Kim, a North Korean spy who is his long-lost daughter, back to Los Angeles and interrogates her.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Where There's Smoke : Sam and Callen go undercover as firefighters when top secret information about suspected terrorists is stolen from a secure Department of Defense container at the site of a fire.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Talion : Season 7 ends with Sam receiving a distress code from his son Aiden that his military school in San Francisco has been taken over by an extremist group led by Tahir, Sam's arch enemy.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: High Value Target : While being carefully monitored by the Under Secretary of the Navy due to the identification of a mole in their department, the team lands an important case involving a Syrian terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Belly of the Beast : The team travels to Syria to capture a high-value target, but the mission quickly goes awry.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Queen's Gambit : NCIS works an abduction case while the team is short staffed, with Hetty held in D.C for questioning, and another team member in ICU following the mission to Syria.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Black Market : A Triad assassin poisons a Homeland Security agent; the discovery of a warehouse of counterfeit purses reveals a money trail to stolen government funds; Nell joins the team in the field.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Change of Heart : Captain Fuller and Hoffs investigate after a popular teacher, who is also an environmentalist, is stabbed to death.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Back from the Future : Through Officer John Cogan of the Metropolitan Police of the future, we revisit significant moments for the Jump Street team members.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: 2245 : Hanson is asked to witness Ronnie Seebok's execution.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hi Mom : Fuller, Hanson, and Penhall investigate suspected drug use in a college athletic program after a basketball player is killed in a high-speed car accident.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Awomp-Bomp-Aloobomp-Aloop-Bamboom : Hanson and Penhall investigate a school paper bombing and end up on a romantic mission.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: La Bizca : Penhall and Hanson go to El Salvador to look for Marta.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Last Chance High : Hanson and Penhall investigate a school of independent study after several office items are stolen.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Unfinished Business : Hoffs and Ioki go undercover at a university where disabled students are being raped.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Shirts and Skins : Penhall infiltrates a neo-Nazi group while Hoffs and Ioki investigate a group that opposes them.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: How I Saved the Senator : A reporter interviews the Jump Street team after a senator's school visit is cut short by a bomb threat.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Rounding Third : While coaching Little League, Penhall discovers a missing child and investigates.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Everyday is Christmas : Penhall is transferred to the 43rd precinct and ends up working with dirty cops.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Blackout : While investigating a gang rape, Hanson, Penhall and Hoffs get stuck in a school during a power blackout.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Tunnel of Love : Hoffs goes undercover inside a massage parlor that is also believed to be a brothel for underage girls.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: McLintock! : The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Cattle Annie And Little Britches : Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Cattle Annie And Little Britches : Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: The Alamo : John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Western Jamboree
programme.desc: Western Jamboree : Ranch foreman Gene Autry, with the help of Frog Millhouse, turns the Circle J Ranch into a dude ranch to help an old friend fool his daughter's rich fiancé into believing he is a wealthy rancher.

programme.title: Hills Of Utah
programme.desc: Hills Of Utah : Gene Autry returns to the town where his father was murdered and finds a mine owner and cattleman feuding. Things get complicated when a boy dies and the mine owner comes gunning for Gene.

programme.title: Goldtown Ghost Riders
programme.desc: Goldtown Ghost Riders : Gene Autry carries the law into a ghost-ridden gold town as a district judge who deals out swift six-gun justice. Gene and Smiley must unravel a murder and a band of outlaws disguised as ghost riders.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: Mad Dog Morgan : The true story of Irish outlaw Daniel Morgan; who is wanted; dead or alive; in Australia during the 1850s.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: We Contine to Truck : As Darlene grapples with a life-changing offer from Ben, an unexpected conversation with David turns her world even more upside down. Relationship problems lead Jackie to the bottom of the bottle at the last place she remembers being truly happy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Preemies, Weed and Infidelity : After Emilio's deportation, Jackie takes on a paternal role crafting a birth plan for Becky; Darlene navigates a love triangle with David and Ben; Harris faces her own dilemma.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Kiss Is Just a Kiss : Darlene struggles to decide between David and Ben; Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom; Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Preemie Monologues : Harris confronts Darlene's lifestyle; Jackie meddles in others' affairs to evade her own issues; Becky struggles with the expenses of parenthood, her family lends support.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford…Lanford : Becky's bartending gig worries Dan; Darlene weighs David versus Ben; Harris' new pal, Odessa, spells trouble.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Nightmare on Lunch Box Street : Jackie's Halloween is a nightmare when she discovers a dark secret; Mary's upset over assumptions about her adoption; Darlene juggles love interests.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tempest in a Stew Pot : Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Slappy Holidays : Thanksgiving chaos erupts as Dan gathers the family; tensions rise over the Lunch Box; Harris surprises everyone with a bold move.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford, Tiolet of Sin : Jackie's decision unites family and community; Becky takes on a late-night job; Darlene goes to extremes to repair her bond with Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Smoking Penguins and Santa on Santa Action : Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Throwing a Christian to a Bear : The Conners resist Becky's Packers fan boyfriend; Dan emphasizes family loyalty to the Bears to Mark; Ben and Darlene seek a loan for their magazine.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mud Turtles, A Good Steak and One Man in a Tub : Becky suspects Jackie's new supplier friend; Darlene's excitement over Harris's college acceptance is challenged by another offer; Dan faces an embarrassing predicament.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Live from Lanford : The Conners debate voting reasons; Louise's offer threatens to take her from Lanford, prompting family intervention in Dan's relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Brothers, Babies and Breakdowns : Dan avoids grief until it confronts him; Ben and Darlene tackle baby fever; Dwight's nervous to fill in for an injured chef.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bad Dads and Grads : Dan connects with his half-brother but struggles with their father's unequal treatment; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Beards, Thrupples and Robots : Darlene joins Price Warehouse for income; Jackie advances her relationship with Ron and Janelle; Ben alters his appearance for advertisers.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tats and Tias : Harris returns home newly-unemployed; Becky seeks childcare; Jackie advises reaching out to Emilio's family; the family ponders tattoos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Icewoman Cometh : Bev returns, wants to spread happiness with her money. She offers to fund Mark's coding camp tuition, but Darlene suggests giving it to Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Pilot Lights & Sister Fights : Dan opens up to Louise; Darlene yearns for motherhood; Ben's responsibilities for Becky interfere with work.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: CPAPs, Hickeys and Biscuits : Dan and Louise deepen their bond amid the challenges of aging; Darlene's night in jail leaves Ben in charge of parenting; Mark's class experiment with a friend results in hickeys.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bridge Over Troubled Conners : Darlene and Ben hunt for apartments; Jackie, Becky, and Beverly Rose road trip to Mexico to meet her father; Dan confides financial woes to Louise.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep on Truckin' Six Feet Apart : The Conners are dealing with the pandemic and life's financial troubles; the Lunch Box is closed for everything but takeout and delivery.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween and the Election vs. the Pandemic : Mary is devastated that Halloween has been canceled by the city, so Darlene and Becky enlist Jackie and the rest of the family to create an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Plastics, Trash Talk & Darlene Antoinette : Darlene isolates herself from her co-workers at Wellman Plastics, leaving them with the impression she is an elitist snob.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Birthdays, Babies and Emotional Support Chickens : It's Beverly Rose's first birthday -- but it's not all cake and candles -- when Becky and Emilio disagree on what kind of party they should have.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Friends in High Places and Horse Surgery : Darlene's friendship with a manager at Wellman Plastics lands her in an awkward situation; Louise's brother tries to win over Jackie.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Protest, Drug Test and One Leaves the Nest : Harris's job is in jeopardy after joining a protest she strongly believes in, leading to tense discussions within the family.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Cold Mom, a Brother Daddy and a Prison Baby : Ben's mom arrives after an unexpected death and unveils shocking information from the past; Becky and Emilio spend more time together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Young Love, Old Lions and Middle-Aged Hyenas : Harris brings home her new friend, Josh, leaving the family questioning his intentions; Becky and Ben's attempt to build a closet stirs up family drama.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Promotions, Podcasts and Magic Tea : Darlene earns a promotion at Wellman Plastics, while Ben decides on a new career path; Jackie tries an herbal tea. and it leads to an emotional revelation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Who Are Bosses, Boats and Eckhart Tolle? : Chuck's new purchase of a boat creates a rift; Darlene hires her first assistant at Wellman's Plastics but soon realizes she is anything but helpful.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Panic Attacks, Hardware Store and Big Mouth Billy Bass : Darlene starts to feel the pressures of her new job; Dan attempts to help Ben out at the hardware store, but the two don't always agree on how to run the business.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Who Gets to Keep Togepi? : On leaving the Pokémon Center, our heroes discuss what they think will hatch from the Pokémon Egg Ash discovered. Nearby, Team Rocket begins hatching another daring plan to make it theirs!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Bulbasaur’s Mysterious Garden : During a battle with another Trainer’s Rhyhorn, the bulb on Bulbasaur’s back begins to glow, prompting Ash to take it to the local Pokémon Center. They soon discover that Bulbasaur isn’t sick—it’s getting ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Case of the K-9 Caper! : On their way to Cinnabar Island, our heroes join Officer Jenny and the police force’s Growlithe in some special training, hoping to improve Pikachu’s battling skills.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Pokémon Paparazzi : On a brief stop for lunch, Ash, and his friends meet Todd Snap, a Pokémon photographer who has been trying to get a perfect shot of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Ultimate Test : Realizing that he hasn’t won any Gym badges for a while, Ash signs up for the Pokémon League Admissions Exam, a great chance to prove he’s got what it takes to become a Pokémon Master!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Breeding Center Secret : Ash and the gang decide to check out a breeding center that they saw on a commercial. However, the center is a cover for a diabolical scheme from Team Rocket members Butch and Cassidy—old rivals of Jessie and James!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Princess vs. Princess : Misty and Jessie compete to be Queen of the Princess Festival! Ash and Brock lend Misty their Pokémon for the battle, and Jessie takes a licking despite a surprise Pokémon of her own.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Purr-Fect Hero : It’s Kids Day, and Ash and friends help some schoolchildren celebrate. Team Rocket spoils the fun by grabbing a kid instead of Pikachu. In a shocking turn of events, Meowth becomes a good guy…or does he?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Riddle Me This : Our heroes travel to Cinnabar Island, where Ash hopes to win the Volcano Badge. A strange character offers riddles about how to find the Gym, where Ash and Pikachu have a fiery battle with a Pokémon they’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Volcanic Panic : Ash has finally located the Gym, suspended above a pool of molten lava! This battle for the Volcano Badge can only be won by a strong Fire-type Pokémon, so Ash must rely on his misbehaving Charizard.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Beach Blank-Out Blastoise : While Ash and the gang hurry to catch the last ferry off Cinnabar Island, they get sidetracked by a group of Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise that need assistance!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Misty Mermaid : Misty's Horsea desperately needs exercise, so the gang decides to take it to her sisters' Gym in Cerulean City. There, she learns that her sisters are planning an exciting underwater ballet.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Clefairy Tales : Ash, Brock, and Misty get sidetracked on their way to Viridian City when all of their belongings mysteriously disappear. While searching for their missing things, they find themselves mixed up in a close encounter that’s really out of this world!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Battle of the Badge : Our heroes make their way to Viridian City, where Ash hopes to earn the Earth Badge. They get to the Gym just in time to see his rival, Gary, being defeated by an unknown Pokémon—and Gary insists that it's evil!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: It’s Mr. Mime Time : On their way back to Pallet Town, our heroes encounter a runaway Mr. Mime. Ash disguises himself as another Mr. Mime so he can get close. When Team Rocket strikes, will they catch the right Mr. Mime?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Snow Way Out! : Our heroes find themselves at a fork in the road and decide to climb a steep and dangerous mountain. Pikachu gets lost, and they must all work together to find it, stay warm, and weather a storm.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Showdown at the Po-Ké Corral : On a visit to Professor Oak’s house, Ash runs into Gary, and they talk about the upcoming Pokémon League. Professor Oak says they should learn from each other rather than competing, and that teamwork pays off when Team Rocket attacks!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Evolution Solution : Ash and his mother take a vacation to Seafoam Island. While he's there, he's looking for the programmer of the Pokédex to learn about the peculiar evolution of SlowPoké. Team Rocket's bumbling brings to light this surprising mystery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Pi-Kahuna : When Ash wipes out during a surfing attempt, Victor rescues him and tells him about Humungadunga, a giant wave that sweeps through every 20 years. Can Ash and Pikachu give Victor the confidence he needs to catch the giant wave?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Make Room for Gloom! : Back in Pallet Town, Ash, and friends meet Florinda, who works at the local nursery. Her Gloom won't evolve, so she’s afraid she's not training it properly. When Team Rocket attacks, everyone sees just how strong a Pokémon can become!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Lights, Camera, Quack-Tion! : Everyone wants to become the star when a famous director arrives in town! Ash, Brock, Misty, and Team Rocket are working hard to ensure their Pokémon will be the ones to star opposite Wigglytuff in his movie as he solely desires them.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Hollywood Heartbreak/Go West Young Meowth : When the gang attends the premiere of 'Pokémon in Love,' Meowth looks back on his painful past. He shares the story of his life before Team Rocket, including how he learned to walk and talk like a human.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: To Master the Onixpected : With only three weeks left before the Pokémon League competition, Ash, Brock, and Misty head up to Mt. Hideaway to find one of the Elite Four. They're after Pokémon training tips, but they discover a land of overgrown Onix instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Ancient Puzzle of Pokémopolis : While Ash and Brock train for the Pokémon League, they uncover a hidden temple containing Pokémon fossils. Misty remembers a hidden city where people built temples to honor Pokémon. Could they have stumbled upon the ancient city of Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Bad to the Bone : Our heroes are headed to the Pokémon League tournament at the Indigo Plateau when they meet another Trainer going their way. Unfortunately, all of his Gym badges have been stolen, so he can't compete…unless he takes Ash's badges instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: All Fired Up! : The Pokémon League is about to begin with the ceremonial lighting of the torch, which carries a flame from the Legendary Pokémon Moltres. Of course, Team Rocket tries to steal it!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Round One – Begin! : It's the first day of the Pokémon League, and when Ash's friends learn his first battle will be held on the Water Field, they're full of advice!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Fire and Ice : As the Pokémon League continues, Ash battles on the Rock Field and has a run-in with Team Rocket after they set up a fake Pokémon Center to lure unwary Trainers!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Fourth Round Rumble : Ash faces his toughest opponent yet on the Grass Field at the Pokémon League! Are he and his Bulbasaur ready to take on his opponent and her powerful Scyther?

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: Moonstruck : In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Leaving Las Vegas
programme.desc: Leaving Las Vegas : Nicolas Cage garnered a Best Actor Oscar for his hauntingly disturbing portrayal of a suicidal alcoholic who falls for a compassionate Las Vegas prostitute (Elisabeth Shue) in one of the year's most critically acclaimed films.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Dennis Nilsen : A profile of Dennis Nilsen, one of Britain's most prolific serial killers; Discussing if Dennis Nilsen's obsession with death fused during his childhood, or was his instinct to kill hard-wired from birth.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: David Berkowitz: The Son of Sam : The Son of Sam spread terror through the streets of New York, shooting women or couples parked in cars.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The Hollywood Hillside Strangler : Killing cousins committed a series of murders that left the women of Los Angeles terrified.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Dennis Rader : Dennis Rader, church deacon, scout leader and family man, killed 10 people in cold blood.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The Angel of Death : During a 59-day stint as a nurse, Beverly Allitt attacked 13 children, killing four.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The Predator : A hook-up via a gay dating app leads to an accusation of sexual violence; Bedfordshire Police investigate.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Murder on Camera : Two men have been murdered outside a pub; can police convince witnesses to talk?

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Murder on Camera : The lead suspect in a double murder is at large; a letter may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The Devil's Chain : The gripping inside story of a brutal machete and gun attack on the victim's doorstep.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The Conspiracy to Murder : Detectives interview a suspect possibly involved in a murder conspiracy.

programme.title: Autopsy
programme.desc: Garry Shandling : Garry Shandling's death at 66 shocked his fans and the show business community. During his career he garnered over 60 awards or nominations, including Emmys with his self-analytical and self-deprecating humor.

programme.title: Autopsy
programme.desc: Tammy Wynette : On April 6, 1998, country icon Tammy Wynette was found dead in her Nashville home; following her death, her daughters sued both her husband and doctor, leading to the exhumation of her body and an autopsy.

programme.title: Autopsy
programme.desc: Dana Plato : On May 8, 1999, the world was saddened by the news that actor Dana Plato, died in Moore, Oklahoma. As a child star in Eighties TV show 'Diff'rent Strokes' Dana had captured the heart of America playing everyone's favorite sister, Kimberley Drummond.

programme.title: Autopsy
programme.desc: Steve McQueen : The life and legacy of Steve McQueen, the star of "The Great Escape" and "Bullitt"; it also examines the rumors and allegations surrounding his 1980 death.

programme.title: Autopsy
programme.desc: Lucille Ball : On April 26, 1989, Lucille Ball, America's first lady of comedy, dies in a Los Angeles hospital leaving the world heartbroken; the 77-year-old actress dies of a rupture of the aorta, a life-ending tear of the largest artery in the human body.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: MODUS Super Series Champions : Henry Deacon is joined on Tungsten Talk by MODUS Super Series champions Jim McEwan and Andreas Harrysson.

programme.title: The Story of Max Hopp
programme.desc: The Story of Max Hopp : Chris Murphy and Henry Deacon discuss Max Hopp's trailblazing darts career.

programme.title: Best of the MODUS Super Series
programme.desc: Michaels vs. McEwan: Series 5 Champions Night Final : Watch Jim McEwan face Mareno Michels in this thrilling full match from the Series 5 Champions Night Final!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.desc: Beau Greaves Vs The Bullseye Challenge II : Featuring Neil Duff, Bradley Brooks and more!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Gemma Hayter : Gemma Hayter joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to discuss her darts return and the future of women's darts.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: The Story of Matthew Edgar : Matthew Edgar joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk for a revealing interview about his darts journey.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Team America
programme.desc: Break of Throw: Team America : Paul Nicholson goes red, white & bullseye with Team USA, analysing the throws of Alex Spellman & Jason Brandon.

programme.title: Best of the MODUS Super Series
programme.desc: Labanauskas vs. Sykes: Series 9 Champions Night : Watch Darius Labanauskas face Tom Sykes in this thrilling full match from the Series 9 Champions Night Final!

programme.desc: Charlie Martin : Charlie Martin talks about his Winmau Championship Tour and Global Championship runs - and what to expect next.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Reels of Misfortune : Family is at the forefront of fishermen's fight to fish hard and make money in North Carolina's bluefin tuna fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Nine-Foot Monster : Seven crews take on the Outer Banks hoping to catch fish that are big enough to keep; the outcome isn't looking great with the luck they've had lately.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Burn Blubber : The season is coming to an end and Reels of Fortune continues to battle Fishin' Frenzy for the top spot; all crews struggle to land fish, desperate for a paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: On a Fin and a Prayer : Fleets have only five days left before the season closes; Reel Action is stuck at the dock after an accident, causing a late start for the crew and tensions onboard to reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Wicked End : It's the final two days of the season and three Southern boats - the Fishin' Frenzy, the Reels of Fortune and the Doghouse - are each within reach of the top spot.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Back in the Battle : The fleet must overcome new obstacles yet again when bluefin season begins in the Outer Banks.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Wicked Waters : Known as the Graveyard of the Atlantic, the North Carolina coastline is littered with shipwrecks; as the bluefin season takes off, the treacherous waters claim another victim, and the Fishin' Frenzy and Hot Tuna are first on the scene.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A Bluefin for Boo : The unpredictable waters cause more problems for boats in the Outer Banks; the captains feel the pressure as the season starts to slip away from them.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Underdog Day Afternoon : With the fishing migration in an unpredictable state, the captains resort to espionage for information, but end up with more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Not How We Operate : The pressure is on to land a fish first when old and new rivals clash on the high seas.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Karma Kid : As the boats are now past the halfway point in the season, the pressure is on to catch enough bluefin tuna to become the number one boat in the fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Old Sailors and Bold Sailors : Winter reaches its peak, created dangerous conditions at sea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Hostile Waters : With only eight days of fishing remaining, the crews are desperate to secure a few final catches.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Striking Distance : Capt. Tyler McLaughlin stuns the fleet with his surprise comeback, while the other captains struggle to bring in a catch.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Luck Be a Tuna Tonight : Each captain is desperate to bring in one last catch.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Fighting Frenzy : Captain Greg Mayer is determined to land the season's first fish, but he must contend with a new adversary -- his former mate.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: One Trick Pony : Lou's boyfriend, Carl, comes to Heartland to convince her to move to Chicago with him.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Come What May : Jack asks Ty to join him on a cattle roundup; Ben avoids his aunts phone calls.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A Telling Silence : Elizabeth assists a mute student who is having a difficult time coping with the death of her father; Jack looks into the mysterious circumstances surrounding the burning of Coal Valley's only church.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Secrets and Lies : After finding the cans of whale oil, Jack investigates Cat Montgomery for her possible involvement in the church arson case; the evidence points to Cat and Gabe becomes upset by the idea of his mother being imprisoned for something she didn't do.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Out of the Darkness : A famous race horse is sent to Heartland for rehabilitation.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ghost From the Past : Ty is confronted by a ghost from his past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Born to Run : Jack and Ty go on a Mustang roundup; Scott learns his childhood home has been transformed into a dude ranch.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: We're Not Losing a Son... : As Abby settles in at her firm's Baltimore office, she wonders if she can remain just friends with Trace; a beautiful woman from Trace's past arrives unannounced to Chesapeake Shores; Megan tries to repair her relationship with Connor in New York.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: We're Gaining a Daughter : Kevin remains missing and the family frantically awaits news; Abby goes to New York to fight for custody of her daughters; Trace continues to hide from his past, but a surprising new idea may have him returning to his music dream after all.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Falling for the Manny : When single mom Alice finds herself up for partner at her firm, there's just one obstacle: the annual partners family retreat. Alice hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help look after her 9-year-old daughter while they're away.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Thicker Than Water : Lou is heartbroken when she realizes that Amy and Tim share a deeper bond; Jack turns to Ty for dating advice.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Rising From the Ashes : One of the barns erupts into flames, and Jack gets injured getting the horses out; Lou and Amy are terrified that they might lose their grandfather.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The Dance : Abigail takes in Carla Noonan, a pregnant widow, to keep an eye on her health while Coal Valley's doctor is away; the new coal miners arrive; Elizabeth is immediately charmed by young miner Billy Hamilton.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: These Games : Elizabeth feels caught between overprotective Jack and new miner Billy Hamilton; when Jack tells her he has proof Billy lied to her, Elizabeth decides she's had enough; Abigail suggests Jack try a gentler approach to reach Elizabeth.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Lost Without You
programme.desc: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Lost Without You : A strange package containing what may be someone's bucket list shows up in a prop mailbox on a commercial set. A straight-laced postal detective attempts to track down its intended recipient.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kona Gold Chopper : Danny and the Count's Kustoms crew rally together to help Shannon restore his father's long lost chopper. Meanwhile, Danny does a do-over on his customized 1990 Chevy Suburban.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's Dream Benz : After nearly thirty years, Danny decides it's finally time to restore his late father's rare 1982 Mercedes Benz 500 SEC AMG, the way he would have wanted to.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: McQueen For A Day : Pawn Stars Rick Harrison shows up to give the guys of Count s Kustoms the project of a lifetime.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Buggin' Out : Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy. Will Danny prove Scott wrong and flip this sand shredder for some serious dough?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: G-T-Whoa! : Get revved up when Danny spots a killer 1967 Pontiac GTO at one of the biggest car shows in Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Buyer's Remorse : Trouble finds Danny when he makes a reckless buy at an auction. Will a hunk of junk force him to finally admit defeat?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Back In The Wind : Tasked with building a custom bike for a disabled man, Danny and his team must figure out a way to tackle a tricky transformation.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Deep Trouble : Danny may be in over his head when he takes on his first boat. Will he be able to tread through the rough waters or will he be forced to abandon ship?

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Road to SEMA : When Donnie decides that he wants to take his 1968 Fastback to SEMA, Dan and FantomWorks are thrown for a loop. Now, they need to get the Fastback and a 1964 Corvette to the prestigious show within a crushing time frame.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: 85 In The Fast Lane : At FantomWorks, there are 85 cars being worked on and multiple owners who expect miracles. From a vintage motorcycle to getting a 1970 GTO ready for a returning vet, Dan burns the midnight oil to get cars out the door so new arrivals can take their place.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Because I Can : Mickey’s 1970 Chevelle is perfect, but he wants FantomWorks to tear it apart and upgrade everything to make it his own. Thom’s 1963 Studebaker is a project car with a nightmare combination of leaks, bad parts and a rusted-out floor held together by glue.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nightmare On Hampton Blvd : Rick comes to FantomWorks for a nightmare combination of gadgets, gizmos, and upgrades for his 1972 Cadillac Hearse. Merlyn and Lynn are farmers from Minnesota with a 1959 Chevy Apache that’s so dangerous they’ve never driven it beyond their driveway.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: High Impact : Scott’s 1953 Fleetwood is a monumental challenge that takes a turn to the crazy when Dan has to add rare features that the car never had in the first place. John wants FantomWorks to make his 1967 Mercury Cougar roaring more fiercely than ever.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tough Act to Follow : For years, Rich and Kathy tried to get their 1951 Buick Super back on the road. It’s now up to FantomWorks to succeed where four other shops failed. Dan has to solve the mystery of Jim’s classic 1961 Corvette and determine if the car needs major surgery.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beast Mode : FantomWorks dives into prototype hell to give Nick a superfast 1969 Chevrolet Chevelle with an LT4 engine. Barlen wants his mother’s 1957 Chevrolet Bel Air to run like a dream for her birthday. Unfortunately, her birthday is in 30 days.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: If it Sprays, It Stays : Dan agrees to fix a 1947 Mack Firetruck that take FantomWorks into wet and uncharted territory. Ken’s 1971 Malibu Chevelle arrives as a garage ornament that hasn't run in five years, so it’s up to FantomWorks to bring this family heirloom back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Revved Up : Nick challenges Dan to build a 1969 Camaro Pace Car that can beat the fastest Chevelle that FantomWorks has ever built. Pete’s Mustang Convertible was in three different shops, but it arrives with far more problems than anyone was expecting.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Sole Survivor : Ben wants a partial restoration for his father’s 1962 Maserati, but Dan sees only one solution – turning this heirloom into one of the rarest survivor cars on earth. Raymond and Diane only want one thing for their worn out 1966 bug – perfection.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Things Change : A psychotic patient threatens Abby; Dr. Weaver suspects a woman poisoned her own baby; Dr. Romano continues to make rash judgments.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha's Amazing Maze and How to Grow Trees From Seedlings : Martha's new passion project is the maze she's building on her Bedford farm; she shares her plans and inspiration for the project and teaches the proper measuring, staking and fertilizing techniques to properly plant successful trees.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas : Martha serves up delicious homemade pizzas alongside friends and pizza chefs Christian Petroni and Dean Medico; featuring classic pizzas, signature sauces, and more.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More : Martha visits the Japanese restaurant Joji in the heart of New York, where Chef George Ruan shares his secrets for the ultimate omakase experience; culinary giant Daniel Boulud stops by.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Brunch Favorites : Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread : Martha journeys through her local area in search of the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread; learning about homemade bread and pastries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver : Martha is in the test kitchen with English chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver, and they're cooking up a mouth-watering menu of dishes that are easy to make.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha Throws a Tea Party : Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha and the Chocolate Factory : Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Steaming : Cooking chicken breasts in parchment paper; cleaning and steaming mussels; using a bamboo steamer to prepare steamed salmon and peas.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast chicken; roasted root vegetable salad; green peppercorn-crusted roast tenderloin of beef.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Poaching : Using poached chicken breast in chicken salad sandwiches and Cobb salad; poached salmon steaks; poached eggs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Perfect Roast : Rib roast; crown roast of pork; stuffed turkey breast; the best cuts for roasting.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Soups : Homemade chicken soup; minestrone; veloute.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Blanching, steaming and roasting vegetables.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Onions : French onion soup; balsamic-glazed pearl onions; fried onion rings.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast rack of lamb; salt-roasted sea bass; saffron-roasted chicken wings.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: White Bread : Basic Japanese-style white bread loaf; cinnamon raisin swirl bread; jalapeno-cheddar rolls.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: South Atlantic : Virginia peanut pie; Lady Baltimore cake; strawberry shortcake.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Updated Classics : Rhubarb and raspberry rye crisps; flaky buttermilk barley biscuits; spelt layer cake with whipped cream and berries.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Coffee Shop Favorites : Apple cider doughnut cake with whole grain wheat flour and applesauce; maple-glazed pumpkin spelt scones; seeded graham biscotti.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Flour Power : Custardy-herb quiche with a malty rye crust; blueberry coffee cake with muesli topping; a seeded quick bread.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Seeded : Seeded whole-wheat English muffins; seeded Saratoga torte; light and crispy whole-grain seeded wafer crackers.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Latin American Cookies : Cinnamon sugar-coated polvorones; bite-sized sandwich cookies; Guatemalan champurradas made with sesame seeds.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday : Hannah Heimbuch and Martha demonstrate how to prepare fish for cooking; Chef Marcus Samuelsson makes cured king salmon and halibut en papillote; Martha breaks down a Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: India: A Tour of Food : Martha's friend and restaurateur, Shiva Natarajan, shares the key to making any Indian dish - spices; back in Martha's kitchen, they make butter chicken, lemon rice, and a tangy yogurt sauce.
